rationale.R1.3: The output audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.7: The output flags one missing citation (Liu and Zhang (2019) AUROC number).
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (missing scope adherence).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
